data.note: MOCK POC: triaged the Log4Shell alert (alert-1001) end to end across all four mock data planes — SIEM -> IOC enrichment -> asset blast-radius -> deterministic correlation -> HITL-gated ticket. All data is clearly-labeled fiction (RFC 5737 IPs, example.com/.test). This proves the cross-linked data story triages before any real SIEM/asset/ticketing plane is wired. Run with --live for a pointer to the real alert-triage harness.
